prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large yellow metal cube
  - obj_1: small red rubber sphere
  - obj_2: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_3: small cyan rubber cube
  - obj_4: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_5: large yellow metal cube
  - obj_6: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: large purple rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_9: small yellow metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0041] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0042] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0043] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0044] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0045] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0046] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0047] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0048] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0049] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0050] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0051] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0052] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0053] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0054] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0055] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0056] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0057] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0058] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0059] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0060] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in these scenes. Let me carefully examine the images to determine object positions.

Looking at the images, I need to identify the objects and their approximate 3D positions:

- obj_0: large yellow metal cube (left area)
- obj_1: small red rubber sphere
- obj_2: large yellow metal cylinder
- obj_3: small cyan rubber cube
- obj_4: large cyan metal cylinder
- obj_5: large yellow metal cube (second one)
- obj_6: large cyan rubber cylinder
- obj_7: large purple rubber sphere
- obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder
- obj_9: small yellow metal sphere

Let me estimate distances from the multiple views provided:

obj_0 to obj_2: These appear to be moderately separated
obj_4 to obj_7: cyan cylinder to purple sphere - moderate distance
obj_4 to obj_8: cyan large cylinder to small cyan cylinder - moderate distance
obj_4 to obj_9: cyan cylinder to yellow ball - larger distance
obj_5 to obj_6: second yellow cube to cyan rubber cylinder - moderate
obj_5 to obj_8: second yellow cube to small cyan cylinder - close
obj_5 to obj_9: second yellow cube to yellow ball - moderate
obj_6 to obj_7: cyan rubber cylinder to purple sphere - moderate
obj_6 to obj_8: cyan rubber cylinder to small cyan cylinder - close
obj_6 to obj_9: cyan rubber cylinder to yellow ball - large
obj_7 to obj_9: purple sphere to yellow ball - large
obj_8 to obj_9: small cyan cylinder to yellow ball - moderate
obj_0 to obj_3: large yellow cube to cyan rubber cube - moderate
obj_1 to obj_2: red sphere to yellow cylinder - large
obj_1 to obj_4: red sphere to large cyan cylinder - moderate
obj_1 to obj_5: red sphere to second yellow cube - moderate
obj_1 to obj_6: red sphere to cyan rubber cylinder - moderate
obj_1 to obj_7: red sphere to purple sphere - moderate
obj_1 to obj_8: red sphere to small cyan cylinder - moderate
obj_1 to obj_9: red sphere to yellow ball - large
obj_2 to obj_4: yellow cylinder to large cyan cylinder - large
obj_2 to obj_5: yellow cylinder to second yellow cube - moderate
